case_title: FRANCISCO VASQUEZ VASQUEZ VS. HIEN NGOC PHAM, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HIEN'S GENERAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, FRANCISCO VASQUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT HIEN NGOC PHAM, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HIEN'S GENERAL CONSTRUCTION & LANDSCAPING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
